channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina set for Sunday
item.description: Spain and Argentina will face off in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey on Sunday.

item.title: Iran live updates: Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan report attacks after US strikes
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: 5.5 magnitude earthquake in Peru's Andes kills at least 5 people
item.description: Local media broadcast images showing the grief of victims' relatives.

item.title: Full transcript of Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan, July 19, 2026
item.description: On this broadcast, Sen. Mark Warner and border czar Tom Homan join Margaret Brennan.
